distilleries.name: Asbach Visitor Centre and Distillery
distilleries.address: Ingelheimer Strasse 4, 65385 Ruedesheim am Rhein, Germany
distilleries.description: Weinbrand house founded 1892 in Ruedesheim by Hugo Asbach, registered as Asbach Uralt in 1908. Visitor Centre runs guided tours with film, distilling explanation and tastings of brandies and liqueurs.
distilleries.distillation_method: Pot-still distillation of wine to produce Weinbrand, with cask ageing in oak
distilleries.tasting_program: Visitor Centre tour with film, production explanation and tasting of two brandies plus a liqueur, Saturdays at 10:00

distilleries.name: Sektkellerei Reuter and Sturm
distilleries.description: Family Sekt house and small Tresterbrand producer in Walluf at the eastern edge of the Rheingau. Distils a Riesling Tresterbrand from the press residues of regional Riesling grapes alongside its main Sekt programme.
distilleries.distillation_method: Distillation of regional grape pomace; method-traditionnelle for Sekt
distilleries.tasting_program: Visits and tastings during shop hours Monday to Friday and Saturday morning

distilleries.name: Brennerei Henrich Obsthof am Berg
distilleries.description: Third-generation Henrich family distillery and cider house in Kriftel between Wiesbaden and Frankfurt, run by brothers Holger and Ralf. Produces fruit brandies, the Gilors whisky line and Mandarina gin and liqueurs.
distilleries.distillation_method: Pot-still distillation of orchard fruit, malt and grape; cask maturation across multiple wood types
distilleries.tasting_program: Distillery and orchard visits with tastings; tasting events through the on-site Hofladen

distilleries.name: Weingut Mack Hallgarten Tresterbrand
distilleries.description: Family estate distillery in Hallgarten producing a Riesling Tresterbrand from estate press residues. Eighteen hectares planted to 90 percent Riesling and 10 percent Spatburgunder feed the brandy alongside the wine programme.
distilleries.distillation_method: Pot-still distillation of estate grape pomace
distilleries.tasting_program: Distillery and estate tastings by arrangement at the guest house

distilleries.name: Schloss Reinhartshausen Edelbrand
distilleries.description: Estate Edelbrand programme of Schloss Reinhartshausen at the western edge of Erbach in Eltville. The Rheingau wine estate distils a Zibarte wild-plum Edelbrand and other fruit brandies alongside its wine range.
distilleries.distillation_method: Pot-still distillation of estate fruit and grape pomace
distilleries.tasting_program: Tastings at the on-site Schloss Reinhartshausen shop alongside the estate wine range
